title: Skill manifest (frontmatter)
description: YAML frontmatter contract for skills/*/SKILL.md. Strict additionalProperties=false: any new field must be added here AND propagated through validate-skills.cjs (PLAN R19 single-source rule).

name.description: kebab-case slug; matches the directory name

description.description: human-readable trigger sentence consumed by the runtime's skill router

runtime.description: v4.5 — which runtime(s) this skill targets. Defaults to 'all' when absent (Phase 4 adapter installs everywhere).

mcp_tools_required.description: v4.5 — MCP tool names this skill calls; Phase 3+ generators verify availability

cli_fallback.description: v4.5 — ultra-tools subcommand to fall back to when MCP unreachable

argument-hint.description: Claude Code convention: hint shown after slash-command name

allowed-tools.description: Claude Code convention: comma-separated tool allowlist

user-invocable.description: Claude Code convention: can the user call this via slash command

disable-model-invocation.description: Claude Code convention: skill is not auto-invoked by the model

context.description: Claude Code convention: 'fork' isolates skill output from main conversation
